allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/pip.exe install pytest pydantic pydantic-settings structlog)
Bash(pip install pytest pydantic pydantic-settings structlog)
Bash(docker restart trading_pipeline_deduplicator trading_pipeline_entity_resolver trading_pipeline_normalizer trading_signals_ai_summarizer)
Bash(docker exec trading_postgres psql -U trading -d trading_db -c "SELECT source, COUNT\(*\), MAX\(created_at\) FROM news_item GROUP BY source ORDER BY max DESC;")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec trading_redpanda rpk topic consume signals.filtered -n 1 --offset end -o -1)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\)\); t=d.get\(''filter_technicals'',{}\); print\(''ticker:'', d.get\(''ticker''\)\); print\(''filter_technicals:'', json.dumps\(t, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec trading_redpanda rpk topic describe signals.actionable)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec trading_redpanda rpk topic consume signals.actionable -n 1 --offset end -o -1)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; raw=sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\); d=json.loads\(raw\); print\(''offset:'', d.get\(''offset''\)\); print\(''ts:'', d.get\(''timestamp''\)\); val=json.loads\(d.get\(''value'',''{}''\)\); print\(''ticker:'', val.get\(''ticker''\)\); print\(''created_at:'', val.get\(''created_at''\)\)")
